name: Oven-Baked Cherry Tomatoes (Disney Kids)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease a baking dish large enough to spread the cherry tomatoes on the bottom.
3. Stem the tomatoes and place them in the baking dish.
4. Sprinkle the onion, garlic, basil, salt, and pepper over the tomatoes.
5. Drizzle with the olive oil and vinegar.
6. Bake until the tomatoes are soft, 20 to 30 minutes.
7. Garnish with the parsley and serve warm.
8. Serves 6 to 8.
